corporate_clean.style_suffix: Consistent corporate visual identity throughout. Clean, modern, professional cinematography. No amateur or stock-footage feel.
corporate_clean.negative_prompt_base: text on screen, subtitles, watermark, face distortion, morphing, warping, inconsistent branding, wrong logo, misspelled text, low quality, blurry, amateur look

tech_futuristic.style_suffix: Futuristic tech company aesthetic. Dark backgrounds with holographic data visualizations. Neon accents in blue and green. Clean, minimal UI elements floating in space.
tech_futuristic.negative_prompt_base: text on screen, subtitles, watermark, face distortion, morphing, warping, low quality, blurry, amateur look, bright daylight, outdoor scenes

warm_documentary.style_suffix: Warm cinematic documentary look. Natural lighting with golden hour tones. Handheld camera feel but steady. Authentic, human, inspirational.
warm_documentary.negative_prompt_base: text on screen, subtitles, watermark, face distortion, morphing, warping, low quality, blurry, neon colors, sci-fi elements, dark backgrounds

minimalist_product.style_suffix: Ultra-clean product photography aesthetic. Pure white or neutral grey backgrounds. Controlled studio lighting. Premium, editorial quality.
minimalist_product.negative_prompt_base: text on screen, subtitles, watermark, face distortion, morphing, warping, clutter, busy backgrounds, low quality, blurry
